message:
fix: VFX optimizations, quake renderer refactor, and error handling snapshots

- Mandelbrot: add cardioid/bulb bail-out, hoist loop constants, use y0^2 cache
- Quake: refactor BSP renderer with cleaner player state, remove unused 3D data
- Add invalid-sample error handling tests for mega showcase (bd-3oaig.15)
- Bless new mega_showcase_invalid snapshot baselines
- Update VFX golden checksums for optimized renderers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -276,6 +276,11 @@ const MEGA_SAMPLES: &[MegaSample] = &[
         name: "Sequence Dense",
         source: "sequenceDiagram
    participant A
    participant B
    participant C
    participant D
    participant E
    A->>B: msg1
    B->>C: msg2
    C->>D: msg3
    D->>E: msg4
    E-->>D: reply4
    D-->>C: reply3
    C-->>B: reply2
    B-->>A: reply1
    A->>C: direct
    C->>E: skip
    B->>D: cross
    D->>A: back",
     },
+    // Intentionally invalid sample (bd-3oaig.15): exercise error overlay + diagnostics view.
+    MegaSample {
+        name: "Flow Invalid (Parse Error)",
+        source: "graph TD
    A[Start] --> B[Ok]
    B -->",
+    },
     MegaSample {
         name: "Generated",
         source: GENERATED_SAMPLE_SOURCE,
